snippet.title: Pepsico CEO on the company's consumer-centric approach to managing inflation
snippet.description:
Pepsico CEO Ramon Laguarta joins 'Closing Bell' to talk about the brands resiliency despite tightened economic conditions, beverage brands benefiting from consumers spending more time at home and pricing products in inflationary times. snippet.title: The Maverick CEO: How Ramon Laguarta is Shaping the Future of the Food Industry.
snippet.description:
Welcome to Mindful Thoughts, where we explore the lives and careers of inspiring individuals. In this episode, we're taking a closer look at the incredible journey of Ramon Laguarta, CEO of PepsiCo. From his humble beginnings to his rise to the top of one of the world's largest food and beverage companies, Laguarta's story is a testament to the power of hard work, perseverance, and leadership. So sit back, relax, and let's dive into the world of Ramon Laguarta.

Ramon Laguarta is a global business leader with more than two decades of experience in the food and beverage industry. He was born in Spain and earned a degree in Economics and Business Administration from ESADE Business School in Barcelona. After completing his studies, he began his career in the financial sector, working for several companies in Europe.

snippet.title: "Morals are not for sale": Former Unilever boss on why he turned down a $100M payout
snippet.description:
Former Unilever boss Paul Polman explains why he turned down a $100 million payout on this week's In the City. 

"Morals are not for sale"

Watch the full episode: https://youtu.be/UwDw751y14E

When former Unilever Chief Executive Officer Paul Polman was approached by Kraft Heinz with an offer many would find too good to refuse—a $143 billion takeover bid with a personal payout of $110 million—he says he turned it down. “They think everything is for sale,” he says. “Morals are not for sale.”

Polman, 67, who worked for Procter Gamble and Nestle before Unilever, joins David Merritt and Francine Lacqua on this week’s In the City to share lessons he learned while CEO, and why he says running a company is more than maximizing shareholder returns. “If you would listen to all the shareholders and do what they were asking you to do, your company would be bankrupt before you knew it.”

Watch part 1: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pdGWkP4RfRU

Is London having another moment? Shaken by Brexit, decimated by the pandemic, threatened by new ways of working and a worsening cost-of-living crisis, the city remains Europe’s (and arguably the world’s) beating heart for finance and for culture. In the wake of turmoil, The City of London is reinventing itself. Every week on In The City, Bloomberg’s Francine Lacqua and David Merritt go behind the scenes in the Square Mile and the wider metropolis, uncovering the stories and speaking to the people that matter.

Subscribe to Bloomberg Podcasts: https://bit.ly/BloombergPodcasts
Listen to more of In The City: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLe4PRejZgr0NiwqzpAq6lidJVaI1pX9Cd

#Business #London #Podcast #Finance #Markets #Unilever 

Visit us: https://www.bloomberg.com/podcasts

Follow Bloomberg Podcasts on Twitter: https://twitter.com/podcasts

Visit our other YouTube channels:

snippet.title: Business Strategy Revealed: Laguarta & PepsiCo's Revival
snippet.description:
As your favorite #managementconsultant , I'm set to decode Ramon Laguarta's secret #businessstrategy  , straight from my dream conversation with the man himself.

In this video, we'll dive deep into the #PepsiCoSuccessStory , looking at the intricacies that make up their phenomenal growth curve. From the strategic steps the company has taken to how their leaders, like Ramon Laguarta, have influenced the brand's direction, it's all in here.

We'll explore how #RamonLaguarta , PepsiCo's CEO, has led the company to incredible heights using a unique blend of management techniques and ingenious business strategies. As we unravel this #ManagementMystery, I'll bring you actionable insights that you can apply in your business or career journey.

Stay tuned and get ready for a fizzing revelation as we peek into the inner workings of one of the world's most successful beverage companies. If you're an entrepreneur, management enthusiast, or just curious about the art of #businessstrategy , this video is made for you!

Time Stamps:

1:40 - The Dual Power of Pricing and Innovation
2:07 - Strategy Revealed: Pricing Tactics at PepsiCo
3:16 - Stealth Inflation: A Masterstroke in Strategy
4:15 - Striking the Balance: The Pricing Dance
5:24 - Commodity Costs: The Backbone of Price Hikes
6:00 - Price Seesaw: The Art of Business Maneuvering
6:40 - Price Sensitivity: The Real Power of Consumers
7:25 - Price Sensitivity and Purchase Power
7:54 - Economic Responsibility: A Challenge to Corporations
8:20 - Your Turn: How Would You Steer the Corporate Ship?

Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe to stay updated with the latest business insights and strategy revelations. Also, hit the bell icon for notifications on all upcoming videos. You don't want to miss out on this journey into the world of top-tier business strategy and management!

#pepsico  #RamonLaguarta #businessinsights  #managementconsulting  #businessgrowthstrategy  #ceosecrets

snippet.title: Unveiling the Success Story of PepsiCo, Inc.
snippet.description: PepsiCo, Inc. is an American multinational food and beverage corporation. It produces a wide range of products, including Pepsi, Lay's, Gatorade, Quaker Oats, and more. Ramon Laguarta is the CEO of PepsiCo.

snippet.title: ADSW 2023 Interview: Eugene Willemsen, CEO AMESA, PepsiCo
snippet.description: Eugene Willemsen, Chief Executive Officer of Africa, Middle East and South Asia at PepsiCo, shares his takeaways from this year's ADSW and what he looks forward to at COP28 with H.E. Dr. Sultan Al Jaber, Founding CEO and Chairman of Masdar recently announced as COP28 President-Designate.

snippet.title: Interview with Marie Owens Thomsen on SAF | Sustainable Aviation Fuel
snippet.description:
Interview with Marie Owens Thomsen (IATA, Senior Vice President Sustainability & Chief Economist) on SAF - sustainable aviation fuel and SAF market development.

Learn more here: https://www.iata.org/agm2023
